MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AVIRA, INC.'s motion for Change Of Venue is Off calendar. Dismissal, without prejudice, of the entire action as to all parties and all causes of action filed on January 3, 2014. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
